    S

    sendMessage(String) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.network.ClientEndpoint
    Sends a message to the server.
    sendTableRepresentation(TableRepresentation) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Sends the current table representation to the client.
    sendUpdatesToAllPlayers() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
    Sends an updated table representation to all connected players.
    Server - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server
    Server listens for client connections and manages the poker game logic.
    Server() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
    Constructs and initializes the server, including the game table and server socket.
    ServerEndpoint - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network
    ServerEndpoint handles communication with a connected client.
    ServerEndpoint(Socket, Server) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Constructs a new server endpoint for a connected client.
    ServerMain - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker
    Entry point for the server-side of the poker application.
    ServerMain() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.ServerMain
     
    setAllIn(boolean) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Sets whether the player is all-in.
    setBet(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Sets the player's bet amount.
    setBetThreshold(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the current betting threshold.
    setChatMessages(ArrayList<ChatMessage>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the list of chat messages displayed on the table.
    setChips(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Sets the number of chips the player has.
    setCommunityCards(ArrayList<Card>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the shared community cards on the table.
    setDealerIndex(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the index of the dealer in the players list.
    setEndpoint(ServerEndpoint) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Sets the ServerEndpoint for the player.
    setFolded(boolean) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.player.Player
    Sets the folded status of the player.
    setMyHand(ArrayList<Card>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the cards in the player's own hand.
    setName(String) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Renames the ServerEndpoint's name, used for avoiding duplicate names.
    setPlayerPTR(Player) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.network.ServerEndpoint
    Sets the player object associated with this endpoint.
    setPotSize(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the current total size of the pot.
    setWaitingForIndex(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the index of the player whose turn it is to act.
    setYourIndex(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.gameRepresentation.TableRepresentation
    Sets the index of the player representing the client.
    SEVEN - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Rank
     
    shuffle() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Deck
    Shuffles the deck of cards.
    SIX - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Rank
     
    SMALL_BLIND - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.GameParameters
    The amount of chips for the small blind.
    SPADES - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Suit
     
    sprites - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.ClientMain
    List of card sprites used in the game.
    start() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.network.ClientEndpoint
    Connects to the server and sends the initial player data (name and avatar index).
    start(Stage) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.ClientMain
    Initializes the JavaFX application and displays the menu.
    STARTING_CHIPS - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.GameParameters
    The starting amount of chips for each player.
    startRound() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Starts a new round of poker.
    startServer() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server
    Starts the server socket, accepts client connections, and waits for console commands to start or stop the game.
    statusLabel - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.client.graphics.MenuView
    Label displaying connection or loading status.

    suit() - Method in record class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards.Card
    Returns the value of the suit record component.
    Suit - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.cards
    Represents the four suits in a standard deck of playing cards.
